author: THUQiXuan
name: Order-16 Frozen N-gram Oracle + Score-First TTT
blurb: Pre-fill order-16 n-gram tables from all 8B training tokens (15-token context window). BackoffNgramMixer combines neural + 15 n-gram expert predictions via learned alpha_head weights. Score-first TTT adapts neural weights at eval time without data contamination.
